headline: Arthur J. Gallagher: Cloudy Investment Case Due To AI Disruption Risk
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. has underperformed peers, with shares down ~33% despite continued acquisition-driven growth. Read more on AJG stock here.

headline: 61% of organizations have no formal change communication strategy despite ranking it as their most pressing need
summary: In a business environment defined by constant change, Gallagher's 2026 Employee Communications Report found that change management is now the most valued communications skill among industry and HR teams.
